10186379133121.scentJourney: Opens with an invigorating wave of bergamot, crisp mint, and spicy ginger, lifted by nutmeg. The heart unfolds into a refined floral-aromatic blend of jasmine, lily of the valley, and geranium. The dry-down features a smooth, mineral-woody base of musk, ambergris, and guaiac wood.
10186379133121.brandStory: Orientica is a Middle Eastern fragrance house based in the United Arab Emirates, known for creating luxury fragrances that blend traditional artistry with modern appeal. They focus on high-quality ingredients and aesthetically designed packaging to offer a premium sensory experience.
10186379133121.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. Since this is an Extrait de Parfum, a little goes a long way; start with 1-2 sprays.

10481892589761.name: Scandal Absolu
10481892589761.desc: An intense and sensual amber floral fragrance featuring notes of black fig, tuberose, and sandalwood.
10481892589761.scentJourney: Opens with the sweet, jammy richness of black fig, transitioning into a heart of creamy, opulent tuberose, and settling into a warm, woody base of sandalwood.
10481892589761.brandStory: Jean Paul Gaultier is a legendary French fashion house known for its avant-garde designs and provocative, iconic fragrance bottles. The brand blends high fashion with a rebellious, playful spirit, consistently pushing boundaries in both couture and perfumery.
10481892589761.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. Due to the high concentration, a light application is recommended.
10481892589761.perfumer: Fabrice Pellegrin, Daphné Bugey, Ane Ayo

items.name: Classique Eau Fraîche I Love Gaultier

10584722276545.name: MYSLF Le Parfum
10584722276545.desc: A deeper and more powerful interpretation of the original MYSLF fragrance, featuring a signature blend of orange blossom and wood intensified with black pepper and vanilla.
10584722276545.brandStory: Founded in 1961 by Yves Saint Laurent and Pierre Bergé, the French luxury fashion house is renowned for revolutionizing ready-to-wear fashion and iconic designs like the Le Smoking tuxedo. YSL Beauty, now owned by L'Oréal, continues this legacy of modern, sophisticated luxury through its fragrance and cosmetics collections.
10584722276545.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears for optimal projection. Avoid rubbing the fragrance into the skin to maintain the integrity of the scent notes.
10584722276545.perfumer: Daniela Andrier, Antoine Maisondieu, Christophe Raynaud

10586087850177.name: Gentleman Society
10586087850177.desc: A sophisticated woody aromatic fragrance for men, featuring a striking contrast between floral daffodil and a deep woody accord.
10586087850177.scentJourney: Opens with fresh, aromatic notes of cardamom and sage, leading into a heart of wild narcissus flower and a quartet of vetiver, settling into a warm, addictive base of vanilla, cedarwood, and palo santo.
10586087850177.brandStory: Givenchy is a prestigious French luxury fashion and perfume house founded by Hubert de Givenchy in 1952. Known for its haute couture heritage, the brand combines timeless elegance with modern innovation in its fragrance collections.
10586087850177.usage: Apply to pulse points such as the neck and chest for optimal projection and longevity.

10591368511681.name: Maritime Deep Blue
10591368511681.desc: A fresh, woody aromatic fragrance for men inspired by the open ocean, featuring notes of bergamot, cardamom, water lily, and cedar.
10591368511681.scentJourney: Opens with an exhilarating blend of citrusy bergamot, spicy cardamom, and aromatic juniper and rosemary. Transitions to a wave of fresh florals including water lily, freesia, geranium, and orris. Dries down to a warm, earthy base of patchouli, cedarwood, musk, and moss.
10591368511681.brandStory: Founded in 1992, Tommy Bahama is an island-inspired lifestyle brand that celebrates the finer things in life, including fashion, food, and friends. The brand is built on the philosophy of 'Make Life One Long Weekend,' offering a relaxed, sophisticated aesthetic that captures the essence of island living.
10591368511681.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. As an Eau de Cologne, it is lighter and may require reapplication throughout the day for sustained scent.

Set Sail St. Barts for Women

10595016081601.name: Odyssey Limoni Fresh Edition
10595016081601.desc: A vibrant and zesty fragrance featuring a blend of citrus, marine notes, and a sophisticated amber-musk base.
10595016081601.scentJourney: Opens with a bright burst of citrus and ginger, transitioning into a refreshing marine and floral heart, settling into a smooth, clean base of amber and tea.
10595016081601.brandStory: Armaf is a fragrance house based in the United Arab Emirates known for producing high-quality, affordable alternatives to luxury designer scents. They have gained global popularity for their extensive catalog and stylish bottle designs.
10595016081601.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For best results, apply to clean, moisturized skin to help the fragrance last longer.

10596320313537.name: Miss Dior Parfum
10596320313537.desc: A fruity floral fragrance reinterpreted by Francis Kurkdjian, featuring notes of starry jasmine and ambery wood, inspired by the original 1947 Miss Dior.
10596320313537.brandStory: Founded by Christian Dior in 1946, the House of Dior is a legendary French luxury fashion and beauty brand. It is renowned for its haute couture, iconic fragrances, and timeless elegance, consistently shaping global fashion and beauty trends.
10596320313537.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears for optimal diffusion. Avoid rubbing the skin after application to maintain the integrity of the scent.

10608936812737.name: Paintings Collection Paonne
10608936812737.desc: A warm, spicy, and woody unisex fragrance from the Milestone Paintings Collection, inspired by Penhaligon's Portraits.
10608936812737.brandStory: Milestone Perfumes is a fragrance house known for producing affordable alternatives and inspired-by versions of popular luxury and niche perfumes. They focus on making high-end scent profiles accessible to a wider audience through their various collections.
10608936812737.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For best results, apply to moisturized skin to help the fragrance last longer.

10643590021313.name: 5th Avenue NYC Love
10643590021313.desc: 5th Avenue NYC Love layers a bouquet of peony, orange blossom and gardenia over notes of sandalwood and patchouli. With a hint of green pear and mandarin oil, it’s a beautifully enveloping scent that channels exhilarating love.
10643590021313.scentJourney: Opens with a bright, sparkling burst of pear and Sicilian mandarin, transitioning into a romantic floral heart of peony, gardenia, freesia, and orange blossom, and settling into a creamy, musky base of sandalwood, patchouli, and musk.
10643590021313.brandStory: Elizabeth Arden is a legendary American beauty brand founded by Florence Nightingale Graham (known as Elizabeth Arden) in 1910. The brand is renowned for its iconic Red Door salon, skincare innovations like Ceramide capsules, and a vast portfolio of accessible, classic fragrances that celebrate timeless elegance and modern style.
10643590021313.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. Do not rub the fragrance into the skin, as this can break down the top notes and alter the scent development.

10687420498113.name: Valaya Exclusif
10687420498113.desc: A floral woody fragrance that elevates the fresh, sensual notes of the original Valaya with an enveloping heart of velvety almond, vanilla, and white woods.
10687420498113.scentJourney: Opens with the purity of white flowers and citrus, transitioning into a heart of powdery notes and orange blossom, settling into a base of creamy woods, vanilla, and musk.
10687420498113.brandStory: Parfums de Marly is a contemporary fragrance house that revives the splendor of the 18th century, inspired by the prestigious horse races and the refined lifestyle of King Louis XV. The brand blends historical inspiration with modern perfumery techniques to create sophisticated, high-quality scents.
10687420498113.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For a longer-lasting effect, apply to moisturized skin.

10704555475137.name: Your Touch Intense
10704555475137.desc: A sophisticated and comforting fragrance featuring a blend of violet, toffee, and suede.
10704555475137.brandStory: Maison Alhambra is a sub-brand of the Lattafa Perfumes house, based in the United Arab Emirates. They are widely known for producing affordable, high-quality fragrance alternatives inspired by popular designer and niche scents.
10704555475137.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. Avoid rubbing the fragrance into the skin to maintain the integrity of the scent profile.

10704916775105.name: 5th Avenue NYC Vibe
10704916775105.desc: A vibrant and energetic Floral Woody Musk fragrance inspired by the sophistication and pulse of New York City.
10704916775105.scentJourney: Opens with a fresh, fruity rush of pear, nectarine, and red currant, leading into a delicate floral heart of rose, jasmine, violet, and freesia, and settling into a warm, musky base with hints of coconut nectar and patchouli.
10704916775105.brandStory: Elizabeth Arden is a legendary American beauty brand founded by Florence Nightingale Graham, who opened her first Red Door salon in 1910. The brand is known for its pioneering approach to skincare, makeup, and fragrance, blending scientific innovation with timeless elegance.
10704916775105.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For best results, apply to clean, moisturized skin to help the fragrance last longer. Do not rub the fragrance into the skin.

10871692067009.name: Si Passione Intense
10871692067009.desc: A bold, intense evolution of the iconic Si Passione line, featuring a vibrant blend of blackcurrant, luminous jasmine, and warm vanilla.
10871692067009.scentJourney: Opens with a vibrant, fruity burst of blackcurrant and pear, transitions into a luminous jasmine heart, and settles into a warm, creamy base of vanilla and sandalwood.
10871692067009.brandStory: Giorgio Armani is a legendary Italian fashion house known for its timeless elegance and sophisticated aesthetic. The brand's fragrance division, Armani Beauty, creates high-quality scents that reflect the same refined, modern luxury as their couture collections.
10871692067009.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For a more even effect, spray into the air and walk through the mist.

10894767227073.name: Phantom
10894767227073.desc: A budget-friendly fragrance inspired by Thierry Mugler Alien, featuring a prominent jasmine, wood, and amber profile.
10894767227073.brandStory: NEW BRAND is a fragrance house known for producing affordable, mass-market perfumes that are often inspired by popular designer scents. They focus on providing accessible alternatives to high-end luxury fragrances for a wide consumer base.
10894767227073.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. For best results, apply to clean, moisturized skin to help the fragrance last longer.

10925301006529.name: Hawas Viper
10925301006529.desc: A bold, smoky, and daring Oriental fragrance for men, featuring a complex blend of cannabis, tobacco, and coffee, designed for those seeking a distinctive and powerful scent.
10925301006529.scentJourney: Opens with a sharp, green, and aromatic blast of saffron, cannabis, and thyme. Transitions into a rich, dark heart of tobacco, coffee, and spices, before settling into a warm, lingering base of tonka, musk, and gurjan balsam.
10925301006529.brandStory: Rasasi Perfumes is a renowned Middle Eastern fragrance house based in the United Arab Emirates, established in 1979. They are known for blending traditional Oriental perfumery with modern, high-quality compositions, offering a wide range of fragrances that cater to both regional and international markets.
10925301006529.usage: Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. Due to its EDP concentration and bold profile, start with a moderate application.
